question: Which town hosted the G7 summit in June 2026?

snippet_leak.matched_query: Which town hosted the G7 summit in June 2026
queries_tried: Which town hosted the G7 summit in June 2026
town hosted the G7 summit in June 2026

resolution: agentic panel converged; gold overwritten 'Evian-les-Bains, France' -> 'Évian-les-Bains, France' | AUDIT: verbose overwrite 'Évian-les-Bains, France' judged SAME fact as original 'Evian-les-Bains, France' (merely wordier); reverted gold to crisp 'Evian-les-Bains, France', verbatim preserved.

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The G7 summit in June 2026 was held in **Évian-les-Bains, France** (commonly referred to as Évian), from June 15–17, 2026, hosted by France under President Emmanuel Macron.

Sources: 
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/52nd_G7_summit
- https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/
- https://www.elysee.fr/en/G7evian

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: The June 2026 G7 summit was hosted in **Évian-les-Bains (Évian), France**, from June 15–17. [Council of the European Union](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/)
